violations.text: Menu lacks an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream chest have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
The floors in the mobile unit are in poor repair (observed duck taped floors). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
